seoTitle: Yarloop vs Yathroo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yarloop and Yathroo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarloop and Yathroo.
heading: Yarloop vs Yathroo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarloop, Western Australia and Yathroo, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yathroo has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Yarloop (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarloop or Yathroo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarloop has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Yathroo scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarloop scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Yathroo scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarloop or Yathroo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yathroo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
